description: Accepted size baseline and release budget for the compiled Default Style Bundle, measured from the styles-aggregate packed-consumer fixture's production CSS output. See docs/release/style-bundle-budget.md for the review and update process.

budget.derivation: Accepted baseline plus roughly 4-5% headroom for routine fixes, rounded to clean limits (181,296 -> 190,000 raw; 26,996 -> 28,000 gzip). Intentional growth beyond this re-measures the baseline and re-derives the budget per docs/release/style-bundle-budget.md.
